title: Police
subTitle: After an upright police officer captures a ruthless mafia leader in a brutal rape case, the crime lord seeks revenge, igniting a deadly battle.

title: Betting Bangarraju
subTitle: Bangarraju falls in love with a city girl who already has three other suitors. With an invitation extended to all her admirers, he now faces the challenge of outshining his rivals and win her heart.

title: Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs, performed by gifted artists and musicians, is played in rapid succession.

title: Yoga Based Programme
subTitle: Yoga experts showcase various postures and meditation methods, offering practical tools for managing everyday stress and improving wellbeing.

title: Madhurimalu
subTitle: A chef shares some kitchen secrets, simple dessert recipes and demonstrates how to whip up mouthwatering treats in an easy-to-understand manner.

title: Abhinandana
subTitle: Rani, an aspiring dancer, loves Raja, a singer and painter. However, fate forces her into a marriage with her widower brother-in-law, and years later, they meet again.

title: Film Based Programme
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Shavukaru
subTitle: Satyam's life is turned upside down when he is imprisoned under strange circumstances. Subsequently, his incarceration jeopardises his betrothal to Subbulu, the daughter of his neighbour.

title: Telugu Hits
subTitle: A compilation of some of the most trending Telugu hits composed by famous artists is played back-to-back to enthrall the audience.

title: Allari Ramudu

title: Adirindi Alludu
subTitle: A young man pretends to be a Brahmin in order to earn money for his mother's operation. However, things get complicated when he falls in love with a woman who belongs to an orthodox family.

title: Aatma Gowravam
subTitle: A rich landlord who does not have any heir, desires to adopt Srinivas. However, his wife is against it and instead wants to adopt Venu, who is her sister's son.

title: Pillanachindi
subTitle: A widower grieves the demise of his wife, while his father-in-law sets out in search of a new bride for him, in order to fulfil his daughter's dying wish.

title: Bhalevadivi Basu
subTitle: Prabhu, an imposter, masquerades as a forest ranger named Sagar, but for a good cause. However, when his identity is revealed, he is forced to face the repercussions.

title: Bala Mitrula Katha
subTitle: Dharmayya and Satyam, two friends, commit to remain honest after a tragedy. However, their morals are continuously tested as they strive to navigate challenges.

title: Deva
subTitle: After Deva returns to his hometown to look after his father, a gangster's cruelty to the villagers forces him to take matters into his own hands.

subTitle: Subbaiah, an honest and hardworking man, becomes wealthy through his dedication, but his family shows no respect for his efforts and spends the money recklessly. Frustrated by their behaviour, he decides to teach them a lesson.

subTitle: Appa Rao, who makes a living by taking loans, happens to meet Subba Laxmi and falls for her. However, he finds himself in a dilemma when an astrologer predicts her death if she marries him.
